creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 187741
Patch against SVN r453489

kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run for this CMake update.

Update CMake to latest upstream release. This is a minor bug-fix release -- the changelog suggests mostly AUTOMOC bugfixes.

The diff against svn is attached, and is also available as https://reviews.freebsd.org/D12958
